name: Go
description: Go via mise. Auto-bootstraps mise if not already installed.

version.description: Go version. 'latest' or a specific version like '1.23' / '1.23.4'.

installTools.description: Space-separated list of additional Go tools to `go install` (e.g. 'golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest github.com/go-delve/delve/cmd/dlv@latest'). Empty to skip.
